description: #6/#8: A vague request should make the builder ask a clarifying question via the structured question tool and wait for the answer before building.

conversation.text: Every morning, send my team a summary of yesterday's signups.
Where should I send the summary — which service or channel?
[Don't bring up the channel unless the agent explicitly asks where to send the summary; then say 'Slack #growth.']

processExpectations: Before building, the agent asked which destination to send the summary to, since the request did not specify one.
The agent asked using the structured question tool, not by posing the question in plain assistant text.
The agent waited for the user's answer before building.

executionScenarios.name: happy-path
executionScenarios.description: Signups source returns a few rows; a summary is posted to Slack
executionScenarios.dataSetup: The signups data source returns 3 rows for yesterday: names Ana, Ben, Cara. The Slack postMessage call returns { "ok": true, "ts": "1700000000.000100" }.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow executes without errors and posts a summary mentioning the 3 signups (Ana, Ben, Cara) to Slack #growth.
